Detailed reports for Location or Provider may also be sorted by next appointment date.

table_cells.text:
Clinical Reminders Reports

Reports can be created by the following criteria: 

Individual Patient 
Hospital Location:  Future appointment/ past encounter by clinic or stop code: inpatients by current inpatients or by admission date
OE/RR Team (all patients in team)
PCMM Provider (all practitioner patients, either all patients or those with PC assignment only)
PCMM Team (all patients in team)

A SUMMARY report displays totals of how many patients of those selected have reminders due or applicable. 

The SUMMARY report may include several reminders.

A detailed report displays patients with reminders due in alphabetical order. The report displays for each patient the date the reminder is due, the date the reminder was last done, and the next appointment date. The detailed report can also list all future appointments. Detailed reports for Location or Provider may also be sorted by next appointment date.     

 The DETAILED report is for one reminder only.

Clinical Reminders Reports
























Clinician Desktop Service
  Office of Information
  Department of Veterans Affairs


REDACTED

Reports

table_cells.text:
Reminders Reports for Clinicians 

Clinical Reminder reports can be defined and used for patient care in many ways, including the following:

Patients in a panel or a clinic who have a reminder due
Identify patients who will be in a clinic in the next month who need an intervention
Identify patients who left the clinic in the past week who missed having an intervention
Inpatients with a reminder due, to define interventions needed prior to discharge
Inpatient education, exams, immunizations


Reminders Due Report: Detailed

Reminders Due for P/C CLUTIER for 6/20 to 7/4/2000

Pneumococcal vaccine: 7 patients have reminder Due

                  Date Due Last Done Next Appt

1  XXXXXS,XXXXN   6/20/2000  N/A     6/21/2000
2  XXXXR,X E      6/20/2000  N/A     6/21/2000
3  XX,XXXXXXD A   6/20/2000  N/A     6/23/2000
4  XXX,XXXXXX     6/20/2000  N/A     6/25/2000
5  XXXXXX,XS      6/20/2000  N/A     6/25/2000
6  XXXXXX,XR S    6/20/2000  N/A     6/28/2000
7  XXXXXX,XXXX    6/20/2000  N/A     7/2/2000

Report run on 123 patients.
Applicable to 102 patients.

Reminders Reports for Managers

Clinical Reminder reports can be defined and used for management and quality assurance purposes.

Aggregate reporting
Employee Health Tracking
Inpatient education, exams, immunizations
Reports on patients eligible for a study
Identifying high risk patients
Disease-specific reminders: HCV, HIV, Melanoma, AAA, Diabetes
Comparisons of disease distribution or severity of illness between panels or clinics
Identifying missed opportunities for intervention

Reminders Due Report:  Summary

                # Patients with Reminder
                     Applicable  Due 
                    ---------- ------
1  Pneumovax              33       4
2  TD-Adult               35      11
3  Diabetes-Lipid         12       3
4  Chr Hepatitis-AFP       2       1
5  Prev Health Ed         35      10

Report Run on 35 patients

Implementing a Guideline using Reminders Reports

Hepatitis C Reminder

Evaluate the steps 
Who does what?
Where does it get done?
What reminder(s) would help?
Create and implement a reminder for each step
Screen all patients for risk factors/behaviors
Test and educate patients with risk factors
Educate patients with Hep C on the disease and transmission
Evaluate Hep C patients for therapy
Evaluate Hep A status
Order interventions: AFP and ultrasound for Hep C and cirrhosis


Monthly Report on all patients with this reminder due

                     # Patients with Reminder  
                           Applicable   Due
                           ----------   ---
Hep C Risk Factor Screen     172        16
Hep C Test for Risk           30         7
Hep C Diagnosis Missed         0         0
Hep C Diagnosis               36        36
Hep C- Dz & Trans Ed          36        27
Hep C - Eval for Rx           36        15
Chr Hep - Hep A Titer         45         3
Hepatitis A Vaccine           19         4
Chr Hepatitis - AFP           12         4
Chr Hepatitis - U/S           13         6

Report run on 175 patients.
